body.content:
JR East train status information official X | JR-EAST
# JR East train status information official X
The JR East information will be distributed on X. If a delay of 30 minutes or more occurs or is expected within the JR East service area from 4 o'clock to 2 o'clock the next day, a “delay” notice will be given.
Though the latest information will be distributed, please understand that there are cases when the actual operation status differs from the information distributed on X. Please note that it is for reference only.
* [![](img/ico_shinkansen.svg)
Shinkansen
Tohoku Shinkansen, Jouetsu Shinkansen, Hokuriku Shinkansen, Yamagata Shinkansen, Akita Shinkansen
](https://twitter.com/JRE_Super_Exp_E)

Express, Night train
Sleeper trains, Express trains
](https://twitter.com/JRE_Lim_Exp_En)

](https://twitter.com/JRE_Toho_Taka_E)
